issue_summary: Credible reports indicate Microsoft 365 Admin Center access issues affecting admins in North America, with intermittent 'service unavailable' behavior and degraded portal usability across multiple tenants.
impact: MSP admin workflows may be delayed for tenant management, user changes, and support actions that depend on the Microsoft 365 admin portal.
status: Investigating / degradation reported; broad admin-center impact appears credible but scope and recovery are not yet clearly confirmed.
response_1: Avoid non-urgent tenant changes and use alternate admin paths or retry later if portal actions fail.
response_2: Notify service desk and account teams that Microsoft 365 admin operations may be delayed; monitor Microsoft status updates before escalating widely.
